title: trond auto-heal output
description: Returned by `trond auto-heal <node> -o json`. The auto-fix counterpart to diagnose: runs the diagnostic suite and applies known-safe remediations to fail checks. Conservative — anything destructive (remove, network destroy, --force) stays behind a HUMAN_REQUIRED gate.

dry_run.description: True if --dry-run was passed; `healed[].result` will be 'dry_run' rather than 'succeeded'/'failed'.

healed.description: Auto-fix attempts: one entry per fail check that had a known remediation.

skipped.description: Fail checks heal explicitly did NOT touch (no auto-fix mapped). Surfaces suggestions[] so the operator has the same context.

still_failing.description: CheckResult entries that remain fail even after the heal pass — either skipped or where the action returned an error.
